positive: A vibrant, highly stylized abstract floral arrangement set against a deep navy background. The foreground features delicate, stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna, including geometric butterflies and spiraling leaves, rendered with strong, contrasting lines and glowing highlights. The style is a mix of Art Nouveau and vaporwave aesthetics, utilizing gradients of deep indigo, electric cyan, and lime green, emphasizing clean silhouettes and high contrast. Centered composition, perfect for apparel repeating pattern. Digital painting, vector quality, dramatic studio lighting, clean edges, maximum detail.
